title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese details how he built a $481k annual revenue app in 45 days using Claude Code without prior coding experience. He outlines five steps: shipping fast from a problem statement, knowing where to engineer versus reuse, learning domain vocabulary rather than low-level code, planning before building, and proactively identifying failure points. The content includes concrete prompts for managing AI-assisted development workflows.
